purpose: Implementation packet built from existing original-source analysis artifacts. This packet reduces repeated source reading; it is not completion evidence by itself.
trustRules: packet rows must preserve sourcePath and sourceLine/label references where available
mapped/classified rows are implementation inputs, not implementation proof
workers may propose patches from packets, but main Codex must review and integrate
runtime tests/traces are still required to claim implementation parity

sourceSnippets.label: CHARADEAD_CHECK
sourceSnippets.text:
4: @CHARADEAD_CHECK
    5: 
    6: IF TALENT:85 == 1
    7: 	CFLAG:619 -= RAND:5
    8: 		IF CFLAG:619 <= 0
    9: 			CFLAG:619 = 0
   10: 		ENDIF
   11: ENDIF
   12: 
   13: 
   14: ;生きてるなら問題ナシ
   15: SIF BASE:0 > 0
   16: 	RETURN 0
   17: 
   18: ;3~9の乱数を設定
   19: R = RAND:7 + 3
   20: 
   21: ;調教キャラが가이노이드・忍者・サイボーグなら死亡時に従順LV依存で復活
   22: IF (TALENT:310 || TALENT:312 || TALENT:313) && ABL:10 > R
   23: 	DRAWLINE
   24: 	PRINTFORML %타겟은()% 순간 죽었다고 생각했으나, 
   25: 	PRINTFORML 기적적으로 가사상태에서 살아났다.
   26: 	EXP:50 += 1
   27: 	PRINTL 이상경험 +1
   28: 	ABL:10 -= 3
   29: 	PRINTFORML %CALLNAME:TARGET%의 복종이 3 내려갔다.
   30: 	WAIT
   31: 	BASE:0 = 100
   32: ;調教キャラが精霊・幽霊・매각 불가なら死亡, と見せかけて後に必ず復活
   33: ELSEIF TALENT:315 || TALENT:316 || TALENT:199
   34: 	DRAWLINE
   35: 	PRINTL 
   36: 	PRINTFORML %타겟은()% 죽고 말았다……
   37: 	PRINTL 
   38: 	DRAWLINE
   39: 	;수명持ちの精霊・幽霊を死なせると수명が7日縮まる
   40: 	IF (TALENT:315 || TALENT:316) && BASE:10 > 0
   41: 		BASE:10 -= 14
   42: 		SIF BASE:10 < 1
   43: 			BASE:10 = 1
   44: 	ENDIF
   45: 	ABL:10 -= 3
   46: 	SIF ABL:10 < 0
   47: 		ABL:10 = 0
   48: 	BASE:0 = 0
   49: 
   50: ;調教キャラが【愛】持ちなら死亡, と見せかけて従順LV依存で幽霊として復活
   51: ;ELSEIF TALENT:85 && ABL:10 > R
   52: ;	DRAWLINE
   53: ;	PRINTL 
   54: ;	PRINTFORML %타겟은()% 죽고 말았다……
   55: ;	PRINTL 
   56: ;	DRAWLINE
   57: ;	TALENT:316 = 1
   58: ;	BASE:0 = 0
   59: ;	;幽霊化したキャラの残り수명は7日
   60: ;	BASE:10 = 15
   61: 
   62: ;	;이상경험に加算
   63: ;	EXP:50 += 1
   64: 
   65: 	;キャラの殺害回数に加算
   66: ;	FLAG:31 += 1
   67: 
   68: ELSE
   69: 	;死亡時口上
   70: 	TFLAG:13 = 999
   71: 	CALL SELF_KOJO
   72: 	DRAWLINE
   73: 	PRINTL 
   74: 	PRINTFORML %타겟은()% 죽고 말았다……
   75: 	PRINTL 
   76: 	DRAWLINE
   77: 	BASE:0 = -1
   78: 
   79: 	;死亡フラグを残す
   80: 	T = NO:TARGET + 999
   81: 	FLAG:T = -2
   82: 
   83: 	;キャラの殺害回数に加算
   84: 	FLAG:31 += 1
   85: ENDIF
   86: 
   87: ;殺した人数が3人以上で,【威圧感】が付く
   88: ;↑このバリアントではTALENT名は【카리스마】
   89: IF FLAG:31 >= 3 && TALENT:MASTER:93 == 0
   90: 	PRINTFORMW %플레이어는(1)%【%TALENTNAME:93%】를 익혔다
   91: 	TALENT:MASTER:93 = 1
   92: ENDIF
   93: 
   94: RETURN 1

implementationWorkOrder.recommendedWorkerInput: Use only this packet scope to propose bounded web code/test patches. Do not expand the source scope unless main asks. Do not infer completion from packet inclusion.

implementedEffects.effectId: source effect id from this packet only
implementedEffects.test: test or smoke evidence to add/run, or empty if not yet testable
implementedEffects.notes: short reason the effect is covered

remainingEffects.effectId: source effect id from this packet only
remainingEffects.reason: why not implemented in this patch proposal

requiredPatchReviewQuestions: Which original labels/effects does the patch implement?
Which web feature/domain files are changed?
Which source effects remain unimplemented or require transfer/exclusion?

highRiskRows.reason: FLAG/CFLAG/GLOBAL/TFLAG-like families require semantic aliasing before implementation can be trusted.
Source-effect rows are not implementation evidence, but unclassified/blocked rows identify work that cannot be silently ignored.

implementationWorkOrder.packetAccountingRule: Every sourceEffects.rows effectId must appear exactly once in implementedEffects, remainingEffects, transferredEffects, or excludedEffects in worker output.
